hero.title: Find Your Perfect Companion
hero.description: Give a second chance to an animal in need. Thousands of pets are waiting for a loving home.

pets.available_subtitle: Meet our friends looking for a home full of love and care.
pets.no_pets: Soon we will have pets available for adoption.

process.title: Adoption Process
process.subtitle: We follow a careful process to ensure each pet finds the perfect home.
process.knowledge_desc: Meet the pet and make sure they are compatible with your lifestyle.
process.request_desc: Complete our adoption form with your details and preferences.
process.interview_desc: We talk with you to better understand your expectations and capabilities.
process.adoption_desc: Sign the documents and take home your new family member.

testimonials.title: Success Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Learn about the experiences of families who have adopted with us.
testimonials.maria_text: The adoption experience was wonderful. The team was very professional and Luna has adapted perfectly to our family. We couldn't be happier!
testimonials.carlos_text: Rocky has completely changed our lives. He is the perfect companion for my children and has brought so much joy to our home. Thank you for making this adoption possible.
testimonials.ana_text: The process was very clear and I felt supported throughout. Simba is a wonderful cat and I am very grateful for the opportunity to give him a home.

cta.title: Ready to Change a Life?
cta.description: Every adoption not only saves a life but also creates space for us to rescue another animal in need.
